== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|ja|天授 (武周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|1=Tianshou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939678}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:690|690]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Wu Zetian|Wu Zetian]] がEmperor・[[:en:Yejong|Ruizong (Tang)]] を廃し、Emperorに即位して国号を “[[:en:Zhou dynasty|Zhou]] ” とする * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の [[:en:Obama Domain|Obama-han]] 士・{{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} を京都で捕縛。[[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] が始まる * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year /{{ill|Meiji Gen|ja|明治元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji Tennō]] が {{ill|Isshō Ichigen no Shō|ja|一世一元の詔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshō Ichigen no Shō|1=Isshō Ichigen no Shō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11352345}} を発布し、[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] に {{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – 陸軍観兵式でイギリス人軍楽隊教師・[[:en:Fenton|John William Fenton]] 作曲の『[[:en:Kimigayo|Kimigayo]] 』が初演奏 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – 「海軍条例」制定。[[:en:Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of War]] に海軍部を設置
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Hōkō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1727|1727]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Ii Naoshige|ja|井伊直禔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoshige|1=Ii Naoyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161128}} 、第10代[[:en:Hikone Domain|Hikone Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1754|1754]] ) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Kikunae Ikeda|Ikeda Kikunao]] 、[[:en:Chemist|Chemist]] （+ [[:en:1936|1936]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初八]][[zh:九月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840354]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 8|qq=September 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|ja|天授 (武周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|1=Tianshou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939678}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:690|690]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Wu Zetian|Wu Zetian]] がEmperor・[[:en:Yejong|Ruizong (Tang)]] を廃し、Emperorに即位して国号を “[[:en:Zhou dynasty|Zhou]] ” とする * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の [[:en:Obama Domain|Obama-han]] 士・{{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} を京都で捕縛。[[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] が始まる * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year /{{ill|Meiji Gen|ja|明治元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji Tennō]] が {{ill|Isshō Ichigen no Shō|ja|一世一元の詔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshō Ichigen no Shō|1=Isshō Ichigen no Shō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11352345}} を発布し、[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] に {{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – 陸軍観兵式でイギリス人軍楽隊教師・[[:en:Fenton|John William Fenton]] 作曲の『[[:en:Kimigayo|Kimigayo]] 』が初演奏 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – 「海軍条例」制定。[[:en:Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of War]] に海軍部を設置
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Hōkō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1727|1727]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Ii Naoshige|ja|井伊直禔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoshige|1=Ii Naoyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161128}} 、第10代[[:en:Hikone Domain|Hikone Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1754|1754]] ) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Kikunae Ikeda|Ikeda Kikunao]] 、[[:en:Chemist|Chemist]] （+ [[:en:1936|1936]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|ja|天授 (武周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|1=Tianshou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939678}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:690|690]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Wu Zetian|Wu Zetian]] がEmperor・[[:en:Yejong|Ruizong (Tang)]] を廃し、Emperorに即位して国号を “[[:en:Zhou dynasty|Zhou]] ” とする * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の [[:en:Obama Domain|Obama-han]] 士・{{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} を京都で捕縛。[[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] が始まる * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year /{{ill|Meiji Gen|ja|明治元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji Tennō]] が {{ill|Isshō Ichigen no Shō|ja|一世一元の詔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshō Ichigen no Shō|1=Isshō Ichigen no Shō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11352345}} を発布し、[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] に {{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – 陸軍観兵式でイギリス人軍楽隊教師・[[:en:Fenton|John William Fenton]] 作曲の『[[:en:Kimigayo|Kimigayo]] 』が初演奏 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – 「海軍条例」制定。[[:en:Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of War]] に海軍部を設置
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Hōkō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1727|1727]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Ii Naoshige|ja|井伊直禔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoshige|1=Ii Naoyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161128}} 、第10代[[:en:Hikone Domain|Hikone Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1754|1754]] ) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Kikunae Ikeda|Ikeda Kikunao]] 、[[:en:Chemist|Chemist]] （+ [[:en:1936|1936]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

== Events == * {{ill|Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|ja|天授 (武周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|1=Tianshou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939678}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:690|690]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Wu Zetian|Wu Zetian]] がEmperor・[[:en:Yejong|Ruizong (Tang)]] を廃し、Emperorに即位して国号を “[[:en:Zhou dynasty|Zhou]] ” とする * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の [[:en:Obama Domain|Obama-han]] 士・{{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} を京都で捕縛。[[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] が始まる * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year /{{ill|Meiji Gen|ja|明治元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji Tennō]] が {{ill|Isshō Ichigen no Shō|ja|一世一元の詔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshō Ichigen no Shō|1=Isshō Ichigen no Shō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11352345}} を発布し、[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] に {{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – 陸軍観兵式でイギリス人軍楽隊教師・[[:en:Fenton|John William Fenton]] 作曲の『[[:en:Kimigayo|Kimigayo]] 』が初演奏 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – 「海軍条例」制定。[[:en:Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of War]] に海軍部を設置
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Hōkō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1727|1727]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Ii Naoshige|ja|井伊直禔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoshige|1=Ii Naoyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161128}} 、第10代[[:en:Hikone Domain|Hikone Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1754|1754]] ) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Kikunae Ikeda|Ikeda Kikunao]] 、[[:en:Chemist|Chemist]] （+ [[:en:1936|1936]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初八]][[zh:九月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初八]][[zh:九月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初八]][[zh:九月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840354]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 8|qq=September 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|ja|天授 (武周)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshū (Wu Zhou)|1=Tianshou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939678}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:690|690]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Wu Zetian|Wu Zetian]] がEmperor・[[:en:Yejong|Ruizong (Tang)]] を廃し、Emperorに即位して国号を “[[:en:Zhou dynasty|Zhou]] ” とする * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の [[:en:Obama Domain|Obama-han]] 士・{{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} を京都で捕縛。[[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] が始まる * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year /{{ill|Meiji Gen|ja|明治元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji Tennō]] が {{ill|Isshō Ichigen no Shō|ja|一世一元の詔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshō Ichigen no Shō|1=Isshō Ichigen no Shō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11352345}} を発布し、[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] に {{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – 陸軍観兵式でイギリス人軍楽隊教師・[[:en:Fenton|John William Fenton]] 作曲の『[[:en:Kimigayo|Kimigayo]] 』が初演奏 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – 「海軍条例」制定。[[:en:Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of War]] に海軍部を設置
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Hōkō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1727|1727]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Ii Naoshige|ja|井伊直禔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoshige|1=Ii Naoyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161128}} 、第10代[[:en:Hikone Domain|Hikone Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1754|1754]] ) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ） – [[:en:Kikunae Ikeda|Ikeda Kikunao]] 、[[:en:Chemist|Chemist]] （+ [[:en:1936|1936]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 35th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:October 6|October 6]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Itoku|Itoku Tennō]] 、4代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorishige|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorishige|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6993725}} 、4代[[:en:Kishū Domain|Kishū Domain]] 主・{{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q319664}} の兄（* [[:en:1680|1680]] ) * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1775|1775]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Kaga no Chiyome|ja|加賀の千代女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Chiyome|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} （{{ill|Chiyone|ja|千代尼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 加賀千代女|1=Fukuda Chiyo-ni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2964050}} ）、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （* [[:en:1703|1703]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
